So there are a whole host of things that are done and that are invested in time and money in order to facilitate that and to continue that. And the details, I don't think this is the place for that conversation, but it's important to understand that it is not accidental. And your observation is one many make. So if you really want to be effective at this, you have to measure your effectiveness. Just like you would do with any. You have to measure your productivity. You have to measure the productivity of each customer. You have to be paying attention to who does it and who doesn't do it, and then do something about it.
